pc_jp_literals:
が
あまりに遠方のため、続けられ
current_ko_literals:
가
너무 먼 곳이라, 계속하기 어려

runtime_name_token.evidence: The identical PC SC/TC record retains 025032 between fixed literal fragments, proving name insertion rather than static text.

preserved_jp_control.assessment: The JP-only control sits after 親善 and before が; it is retained exactly because static parsing cannot prove its render-time effect.

dynamic_particle_assessment.unsafe_original_particle: Hard-coded 와의 and 가 become wrong for some runtime name endings.
dynamic_particle_assessment.particle_safe_rewrite: Place the runtime name before fixed ' 측과의 친선', then use fixed subject particle 이 after 친선.

replacement_literals:
이
너무 먼 곳이라, 계속하기 어렵습니다.
opaque_policy: Preserve 025032 and 014326020000 byte-for-byte; remove only the tail Japanese suffix command.
runtime_qa_required: Verify rendered names ending in both vowel and final consonant before promotion to apply set.

pc_jp_literals:
が
費用不足のため、続けられ

runtime_name_token.evidence: The identical PC SC/TC record retains 025032 between fixed literal fragments, proving name insertion rather than static text.

preserved_jp_control.assessment: The JP-only control sits after 親善 and before が; it is retained exactly because static parsing cannot prove its render-time effect.

dynamic_particle_assessment.unsafe_original_particle: Hard-coded 와의 and fallback 이(가) are not grammatically invariant at runtime.
dynamic_particle_assessment.particle_safe_rewrite: Place the runtime name before fixed ' 측과의 친선', then use fixed subject particle 이 after 친선.

opaque_policy: Preserve 025032 and 014326020000 byte-for-byte; remove only the tail Japanese suffix command.
runtime_qa_required: Verify rendered names ending in both vowel and final consonant before promotion to apply set.
